calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Accounting And For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that it has already removed the Trustee and appointed a Successor Trustee, and that it bifurcated certain issues. Those remaining issues are ordered off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting And For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To Jun-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Audrey Gerard for Marilyn Sylvestri (Petitioner).

The Court noted that it ordered that the accounting be prepared by February 28, 2019. Ms. Gerard stated that she has seen and heard nothing, that there is a case (302150 The Lucia Trust) which involves the same respondent, that she contacted the Respondent's Attorney Edward Otonello in that case, and that he stated that he did not want to see or know anything about it. Ms. Gerard also requested the removal of Ms. Kunkle and stated that she intends to do an order to show cause re contempt. In addition, Ms. Gerard stated that she does not know if the trust addresses the issue of bond, that she does not know how much or what is in the trust, that in 2012 Ms. Kunkle was the Power of Attorney for Ms. Paletta, that she was ordered to sell the home and that the property sold for $520,000.00. The Court orders the removal of Carol Kunkle as Trustee for failure to respond and comply with the Court order to provide an accounting, and appoints Marilyn Sylvestri as the Successor Trustee. The Successor Trustee must immediately file an ex parte request to post bond when assets are available to her. The Petition to Compel Accounting and for Removal of Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee is bifurcated and the remaining balance is continued to June 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Gerard is to provide a form of order. A status statement is to be filed one week prior to the continued date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting And For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-05-2019 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Accounting And For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Audrey Gerard appeared by telephone for Marilyn Silvestri.
Anthony Cermak appeared by telephone for Marianita Silvestri.

Ms. Gerard stated that she attempted to contact Ms. Kunkle, that Ms. Kunkle has been unresponsive, that she recently learned that Ms. Kunkle is involved in litigation in her Mother's case in this Court, that she does not know the case number and that she is seeking Ms. Kunkle's removal. Mr. Cermak stated that he had the exact same experience in their trust, that Ms. Kunkle fails to respond to all forms of communication and that he fully supports this petition. Mr. Cermak also stated that his case is not currently in Court, that he is concerned and that he heard from family that Ms. Kunkle may have relocated assets into property out of State. The Court orders Ms. Kunkle to prepare and file an accounting no later than January 31, 2019. All other matters in the Petition to Compel Accounting and for Removal of Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee is continued to February 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Gerard is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
